name.text: Finding the area of a farmer's trapezium-shaped field

questiontext.text:
A farmer is designing a trapezium-shaped field. The two parallel sides measure {@a@} m and {@b@} m. The sloping sides are equal in length.

To calculate how much land is available for planting, the farmer needs to determine the area of the field.

[[jsxgraph]] var board = JXG.JSXGraph.initBoard(divid, { boundingbox: [-2, 12, 20, -2], axis: false, showCopyright: false }); // STACK variables var a = {#a#}; var b = {#b#}; var h = {#h#}; var slant = {#slant#}; var x_offset = 2; var diff = (a - b) / 2; // Points var p1 = board.create('point', [x_offset, 0], {visible: false}); var p2 = board.create('point', [x_offset + a, 0], {visible: false}); var p3 = board.create('point', [x_offset + a - diff, h], {visible: false}); var p4 = board.create('point', [x_offset + diff, h], {visible: false}); // Polygon board.create('polygon', [p1, p2, p3, p4], { fillColor: '#e6f2ff', borders: {strokeColor: 'black', strokeWidth: 2} }); // Labels board.create('text', [x_offset + a/2, -0.7, a + " m"]); board.create('text', [x_offset + a/2, h + 0.7, b + " m"]); board.create('text', [x_offset + diff/2 - 1.5, h/2, slant.toFixed(1) + " m"]); board.create('text', [x_offset + a - diff/2 + 0.5, h/2, slant.toFixed(1) + " m"]); // Height line board.create('segment', [p4, [x_offset + diff, 0]], { dash: 2, strokeColor: 'gray' }); board.create('text', [x_offset + diff + 0.2, h/2, "h"]); [[/jsxgraph]]

Calculate the area of the field.

Area = [[input:ans1]] m² [[validation:ans1]] [[feedback:prt1]]

generalfeedback.text:
Worked solution

The area of a trapezium is given by: \[ \text{Area} = \frac{1}{2}(a + b) \times h \] where:

  • \(a\) and \(b\) are the lengths of the parallel sides
  • \(h\) is the perpendicular height

From the diagram:

  • Bottom base: \(a = {@a@}\)
  • Top base: \(b = {@b@}\)
  • Height: \(h = {@h@}\)

Substitute into the formula

\[ \text{Area} = \frac{1}{2}({@a@} + {@b@}) \times {@h@} \]

\[ \text{Area} = {@ta1@} \text{ m}^2 \]

prtcorrect.text: Correct answer, well done.

prtpartiallycorrect.text: Your answer is partially correct.

prtincorrect.text: Incorrect answer.

truefeedback.text: You seem to have forgotten to multiply the product of base and height by the factor 1/2. Kindly check at the step by step worked solution.
You have used the slanted side instead of the perpendicular height to find the area. Please look at the worked solution below.
You have incorrectly used all four sides. Remember only the parallel sides are used to find the area as by the formula. Check on the worked solution below.
